description: Abyssal Depths Patch 3 (11 August 2025) — Season 26 Winner Statues Unveiled, Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

subsections.heading: Depths Changes

items.text: The duration of each level has been reduced by 3 minutes
Players now display a ghostly animation upon death, making it easier to distinguish them from those turning invisible
The time between entering the Depths and being allowed to reenter has been reduced

subitems.text: This means that players who die soon after entering can enter another Depths instance quickly

subsections.searchable_text: Depths Changes The duration of each level has been reduced by 3 minutes Players now display a ghostly animation upon death, making it easier to distinguish them from those turning invisible The time between entering the Depths and being allowed to reenter has been reduced This means that players who die soon after entering can enter another Depths instance quickly

subsections.heading: Vanity Merchant Changes

items.text: Tabs in the Vanity Merchant UI have been reorganized to better match those in the Appearance UI, as follows

subitems.text: Wardrobe, Mount Skins, Victory Emotes, Avatars, Furniture & Consumables

items.text: The price of Victory Emotes purchased with Community Tokens has been doubled, but they now grant five times as many charges
Adventurer Tokens can no longer be crafted

subitems.text: These can be salvaged for 100 Community Tokens

items.text: Any Adventurer’s Challenge Avatar or Avatar Ring can now be crafted with Community Tokens

subitems.text: These can be salvaged for 40% of their Community Token value

subsections.searchable_text: Vanity Merchant Changes Tabs in the Vanity Merchant UI have been reorganized to better match those in the Appearance UI, as follows Wardrobe, Mount Skins, Victory Emotes, Avatars, Furniture & Consumables The price of Victory Emotes purchased with Community Tokens has been doubled, but they now grant five times as many charges Adventurer Tokens can no longer be crafted These can be salvaged for 100 Community Tokens Any Adventurer’s Challenge Avatar or Avatar Ring can now be crafted with Community Tokens These can be salvaged for 40% of their Community Token value

subsections.heading: Mob Changes

items.text: Damage dealt by bosses and minibosses in Hunter Corrupted Dungeons has been reduced
The number of tracks in Tier 5+ blue and yellow zones has been increased to match the amount in Tier 3 and 4 blue zones
Avalonian Raid bosses are now immune to silence effects

subsections.searchable_text: Mob Changes Damage dealt by bosses and minibosses in Hunter Corrupted Dungeons has been reduced The number of tracks in Tier 5+ blue and yellow zones has been increased to match the amount in Tier 3 and 4 blue zones Avalonian Raid bosses are now immune to silence effects

subsections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: The following items can now be sold at the Tutorial Marketplace in the Cove
In Streamer Mode, region names are now hidden in region queues

subitems.text: This applies to the HUD tracker, overhead messages, and notifications

items.text: Cooldown for /whisper, /faction, and /factionlocal chat has been reduced to 0.5 seconds
Trading in Corrupted Dungeons has been disabled
The Journal missions 'Get 150,000 Infamy in Corrupted Dungeons' and above have had their rewards reduced

subsections.searchable_text: Other Changes The following items can now be sold at the Tutorial Marketplace in the Cove Tier 1 equipment Carrot Soup In Streamer Mode, region names are now hidden in region queues This applies to the HUD tracker, overhead messages, and notifications Cooldown for /whisper, /faction, and /factionlocal chat has been reduced to 0.5 seconds Trading in Corrupted Dungeons has been disabled The Journal missions 'Get 150,000 Infamy in Corrupted Dungeons' and above have had their rewards reduced

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Fixed resource filters not working correctly in the Bank Overview
Fixed issue where changing regions with an overcharged item equipped would cause health to display its base value
Fixed rare issue in the Depths where two teams could spawn in the same location
